subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-13 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: if the peoples of the world were to abandon their blind imitations and investigate the truth for themselves, they would all become united
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر ملل و امم موجوده ترک تقالید و تحری حقیقت نمایند جمیع متحد گردند
subcodes.subjects: @blind imitation [taqlid], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @oneness; unity of religion
